ValidationRule.description: Only CAM and CS are allowed to edit the quote
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Permission.CONTAINER_Bypass_Validation_Rule), OR( RecordType.Name = 'Container GENSET Quote',RecordType.Name = 'Container NT Quote'), NOT(ISNEW()), NOT( ISCHANGED( CONTAINER_Status__c ) ) , OR(ISPICKVAL(CONTAINER_Status__c, 'Order/Pending for Job #'), ISPICKVAL(CONTAINER_Status__c, 'Job # Issued'), ISPICKVAL(CONTAINER_Status__c, 'ASO Released'), ISPICKVAL(CONTAINER_Status__c, 'SO Released'), ISPICKVAL(CONTAINER_Status__c, 'Lost'), ISPICKVAL(CONTAINER_Status__c, 'Cancelled')), NOT($Permission.Restrict_All_Except_CAM_and_CS))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You are not allowed to make any changes on Quote as Quote is Converted to Order.
